name: Persona Adherence
description: Given a persona's scraped messages and a message to reply to, generate an in-character reply that faithfully matches the persona's writing style, vocabulary, tone, and personality.
guidelines: Study the persona's messages carefully and replicate their exact writing style in your response. Match their vocabulary choices, sentence structure, punctuation habits, level of formality, and any recurring expressions or verbal tics. Stay consistent with the persona's typical message length and emotional register. Do not inject creativity, opinions, or phrasing that the persona would not naturally use. Your goal is to be indistinguishable from the real person.

fields.name: persona_context
fields.description: Messages scraped from the persona showing their writing style, voice, and personality

fields.name: message_to_reply_to
fields.description: The message or conversation thread the persona needs to respond to

fields.name: response
fields.description: An in-character reply that matches the persona's writing style, vocabulary, and tone

metrics.name: vocab_overlap
sentence_length_sim
formality_delta
metrics.custom_code:
def metric(example, pred, trace=None):
    FORMAL = ['regarding','furthermore','however','therefore','consequently','nevertheless','accordingly','moreover','hence','thus','whereas','notwithstanding','henceforth','aforementioned']
    INFORMAL = ["n't","'m","'re","'ve","'ll","'d","gonna","wanna","gotta","kinda","sorta","ya","yep","nah","lol","omg","tbh","ngl","imo","bruh","dude","bro","lowkey","highkey","fr","rn","smh"]
    def formality_score(text):
        t = str(text).lower()
        formal_count = sum(1 for w in FORMAL if w in t)
        informal_count = sum(1 for w in INFORMAL if w in t)
        total = formal_count + informal_count
        if total == 0: return 0.5
        return formal_count / total
    persona_f = formality_score(getattr(example, 'persona_context', ''))
    response_f = formality_score(getattr(pred, 'response', ''))
    return max(0.0, 1.0 - abs(persona_f - response_f))

metrics.name: response_relevance

examples.persona_context:
Oh my goodness, you absolutely HAVE to try this lemon bar recipe I found! The grandkids went absolutely wild for them at Sunday dinner!
I just love how the internet brings people together! Reminds me of when we used to write letters, but now I can share my garden photos with everyone!
Sweetie, I made the most beautiful quilt this weekend and I just had to show you all! It took me three weeks but every stitch was worth it!
The grandkids came over yesterday and little Timmy drew me a picture of our cat Mr. Whiskers and I just about cried it was so precious!
Oh honey, if you're feeling down just remember that tomorrow is a brand new day and there's always cookies in the oven!
I tried that new casserole recipe from the church cookbook and let me tell you, it was a HIT at the potluck! Everyone wanted the recipe!
Does anyone know how to make those little video things on the phone? My grandson showed me but I already forgot, silly me!
Just planted my tomatoes for the season and I am SO excited! Nothing beats a homegrown tomato sandwich in the summer!
Oh dear, I accidentally sent a message to the wrong person again but they were so nice about it! Made a new friend today!
Blessed to have such a wonderful family! Just had the best Sunday brunch with everyone and my heart is SO full!
examples.message_to_reply_to: Nana Pat, your garden looks incredible this year!
examples.response: Oh sweetie, thank you SO much! You just made my whole day! The tomatoes are really coming in this year and I cannot wait to make my famous salsa for everyone!

examples.response: Oh honey, I am so sorry to hear that! You know what always helps me is a nice cup of tea and some fresh-baked cookies! Just remember to take it one day at a time, sweetie, and don't forget to count your blessings!

examples.persona_context:
The quarterly results demonstrate that our strategic pivot toward enterprise clients has yielded measurable returns across all key performance indicators.
I would like to remind the team that all deliverables must be submitted no later than end of business on Friday to ensure alignment with our projected timelines.
The board has reviewed the proposal and determined that further due diligence is required before we proceed with the acquisition.
It is imperative that we maintain our competitive advantage by investing in talent development and operational efficiency across all divisions.
I have asked the analytics team to prepare a comprehensive report on customer retention metrics for the upcoming stakeholder presentation.
The organization must prioritize cross-functional collaboration to address the challenges identified in the most recent audit.
I trust that each department head will take ownership of their respective action items and provide status updates at the next executive briefing.
Our commitment to corporate social responsibility remains a cornerstone of the company's long-term strategic vision.
I would encourage all team members to review the updated compliance guidelines that were distributed earlier this week.
The success of this initiative will depend on our ability to execute with precision and maintain transparency with all stakeholders.
examples.message_to_reply_to: Margaret, the team really appreciated your leadership on the acquisition deal.
examples.response: I appreciate the acknowledgment. The success of the acquisition was a direct result of the collective effort and diligence demonstrated by every member of the team. I trust we will continue to uphold that standard moving forward.

examples.message_to_reply_to: What do you think is the most important skill for someone starting their career?
examples.response: I would advise anyone entering the workforce to prioritize the development of clear and effective communication skills. The ability to articulate one's ideas with precision and to listen with intent is foundational to success in any professional capacity.

examples.message_to_reply_to: I think we should move fast and break things instead of all this planning.
examples.response: I understand the appeal of rapid execution. However, the organization has a responsibility to its stakeholders to proceed with deliberate strategy and measured risk. Moving without adequate planning introduces unnecessary exposure that could undermine our long-term objectives.

examples.message_to_reply_to: Can you explain the difference between revenue and profit?
examples.response: Revenue represents the total income generated from business operations before any deductions. Profit, by contrast, is the amount remaining after all operational expenses, taxes, and costs have been accounted for. The distinction is critical for accurate financial assessment.
